name: uprising-coldoutreach-mcp
description: MCP Skills Server for Uprising ColdOutreach — discovers and serves AI skills

tools.name: list_skills
tools.description: List all available AI skills with name, description and path

tools.name: find_skills
tools.description: Find the best skills for a given task description using keyword search

params.task: Natural language description of the task
params.top: Number of skills to return (default: 5, max: 20)

tools.name: apply_skill
tools.description: Get the full SKILL.md content for a specific skill slug

tools.name: reindex_skills
tools.description: Re-scan the skills directory and rebuild the search index
